sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32));
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) AS has_nulls, EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > 25) AS has_high_values;
SELECT a.id, a.value FROM test_table a WHERE EXISTS(SELECT value FROM test_table b WHERE b.value < 15 AND a.id = b.id);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM jdbc('jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/?user=root&password=root','schema','table') WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > 15));
CREATE TABLE temp_table (num Nullable(Int32), num_str String);
SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE num = toInt32(value));
SELECT value, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY value HAVING EXISTS(SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE num_str LIKE concat('%', value));

SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM temp_table WHERE num = toInt32OrZero('1') OR num IS NULL) OR EXISTS(SELECT * FROM jdbc('jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/?user=root&password=root','schema','unrelated_table'));
CREATE TABLE another_table (data String, amount Decimal(10,2));
SELECT data, COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = toInt32OrZero(data)) GROUP BY data HAVING COUNT(*) < 5;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE amount > 50) AS above_threshold, EXISTS(SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE num_str = '') AS empty_check;
